headline: Amcor Expands Healthcare And Fiber Packaging As Valuation Discount Widens
summary: Amcor opened an advanced healthcare packaging facility in Malaysia, expanding its manufacturing footprint in Asia. The facility is designed to support local and regional healthcare customers with closer-to-market production and supply chain resilience. Amcor also entered a collaboration focused on fiber-based food packaging, targeting sustainability and food safety requirements. Amcor (NYSE:AMCR), trading at $38.54, is adding fresh capacity in healthcare packaging while also working on...

headline: Amcor (AMCR) Earnings Expected to Grow: What to Know Ahead of Next Week's Release
summary: Amcor (AMCR) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
